title: Bodo Baas's Master

{{Quote|For you Bodo Baas will speak a prophecy written one thousand years before your time, by my own master!|Bodo Baas, gatekeeper of the Tedryn Holocron|<ref name="DE6" />}}
A '''Jedi Master''' was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the conclusion of the [[New Sith Wars]] in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. In approximately [[990 BBY]], the [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-talented individual wrote a prophecy of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|brother]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|sister]] who would [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|face]] the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], with the future of all of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] at stake. The being also [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] [[Bodo Baas]], the last [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]] of the [[Tedryn Holocron]]—which contained Baas's Master's prophecy—in the ways of the Force. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after being written, the prophecy was fulfilled by the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker twins]].

==Biography==
[[File:Bodo_Baas_color.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Jedi Master trained Bodo Baas (pictured).]]
A [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] lived around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Sith Wars]],<ref name="jvs">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> from [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]] to [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Around [[990 BBY]],<ref name="jvs" /> early in the era known as the [[Great Peace of the Republic]],<ref name="tcswe-era">{{CSWECite|I|363|Great Peace of the Republic}}</ref> the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual wrote a prediction of a new [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] threat: a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Jedi would be corrupted by a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]], while his pregnant sister's choice of action would decide the fate of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]].<ref name="DE6" />

At some point, this individual took a Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]], the [[Krevaaki]] [[Bodo Baas]].<ref name="DE6" /> Around [[600 BBY/Legends|600 BBY]],<ref name="jvs" /> after completing his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] and being promoted to Jedi Master, Baas inherited the [[Tedryn Holocron]].<ref name="TEGTC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> Baas added the prophecy written by his Master to the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]].<ref name="DE6" />

===Legacy===
{{ExcerptIU|
A brother and sister born to walk the sky,

But reckless brother falls-into dark side's eye!

Jedi sister carries hope for future in her womb.

Only ''she'' can save the Skywalkers from certain doom!

A Jedi-killer wants to tame her.

Now the Dark Side Lord comes to claim her.

She must battle join against this thief,

Or the dynasty of ''all'' the Jedi will come to grief!
|attrib=Bodo Baas<ref name="DE6" />
}}
As the [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]] of the Tedryn Holocron, Bodo Baas's [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] retold his Master's prophecy to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]<ref name="DE6" /> in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="10 ABY">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' to ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which are set in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> The prophecy was fulfilled soon after, revealing Organa Solo and her brother, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to be the two siblings referred to in the prophecy, and the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to be the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] who claimed [[Anakin Solo]]—Leia's as-yet unborn son—for the [[Transfer essence|new body]] of his essence. Skywalker and Organa Solo eventually [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|confronted]] Palpatine on his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']], as foretold in the seventh line of the prophecy.<ref name="DE6" /> [[11 ABY/Legends|A year later]], Palpatine was ultimately [[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|denied]] possession of the newborn, and the future of the Jedi Order was saved.<ref name="EE2">[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]</ref>

==Powers and abilities==
This individual was strong enough in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to complete the training required for a Jedi and later take on an apprentice. This being wrote a prophecy that became reality a thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later: the forecasting was accurate enough not only to predict the event, but also to foretell the specific beings who would take part in it.<ref name="DE6" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bodo Baas's Master was first mentioned in the [[Dark Empire 6|sixth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series written by [[Tom Veitch]]<ref name="DE6" /> and published on [[October 20]], [[1992]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54062/star_wars_dark_empire_1991_6|text=Star Wars: Dark Empire (1991) #6}}</ref>
